DevAuth.//: Dev-only — slice-015 DevAuthClaimsShim (../customizer/src/Customizer/Middleware/DevAuthClaimsShim.cs, consumed via ProjectReference per Customizer constitution v2.3.0 Principle VIII). When Enabled=true AND IWebHostEnvironment.IsDevelopment(), the shim derives a synthetic EntraID oid claim from the backoffice userKey (SHA-256 → 12-hex suffix on the literal v4 prefix 00000000-0000-4000-8000-) and attaches it post-routing, so PageviewCaptureMiddleware can capture pageviews without a real EntraID tenant. Unblocks every visitor-identified manual quickstart (slices 002, 004-008). Resolves analyzer#40 (originally filed as analyzer#34). The production appsettings.json MUST NOT contain this section (FR-DEV-012 belt-and-braces).
